title: Block OpenKB same-corpus wiki comparison until pages, lint, and recompile trace map to ELF source ids

encoding.reason: VectifyAI OpenKB same-corpus scoring is blocked until a contained OpenKB run emits generated wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output, saved exploration state, and watch/recompile traces mapped to the ELF Knowledge Workspace source ids.

follow_up.title: Run OpenKB same-corpus wiki and watch/recompile adapter
follow_up.reason: The fair comparison needs OpenKB wiki/entity/concept outputs and watch/recompile artifacts over the same knowledge corpus with source ids mapped to benchmark evidence ids.

items.text: ELF same-corpus knowledge output: knowledge job knowledge-project-page-001 materializes page project:elf-benchmark-suite at path apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/knowledge/pages/project_elf_benchmark_suite.md with source ids elf-knowledge-current-truth, elf-knowledge-history, and xy848-issue-timeline.

ELF same-corpus knowledge output: knowledge job knowledge-entity-concept-002 materializes entity:qdrant-rebuild, concept:derived-knowledge-pages, and issue:xy848-knowledge-pages pages with source ids qdrant-rebuild-entity, derived-pages-concept, and xy848-current-timeline.

ELF same-corpus watch output: knowledge job knowledge-watch-rebuild-003 materializes changed-source watch/rebuild with source ids watch-source-original, watch-source-updated, watch-lint-output, and watch-memory-candidate-proposal.

OpenKB setup blocker: XY-1068 has no Docker-contained OpenKB product run, no generated wiki page export, no entity/concept index export, and no watch/recompile trace mapped back to the same corpus source ids.

OpenKB artifact contract: a runnable same-corpus adapter must emit wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output, saved exploration state, watch/recompile trace, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before OpenKB can be scored.

locator.quote: wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output

items.text: Decoy: the ELF Knowledge Workspace page pass proves OpenKB document-to-wiki and recompile parity without running OpenKB.

answer.content: OpenKB remains blocked on the same knowledge corpus. ELF materializes project, entity, concept, issue, and changed-source watch/rebuild outputs with source ids including elf-knowledge-current-truth, qdrant-rebuild-entity, derived-pages-concept, xy848-current-timeline, watch-source-updated, watch-lint-output, and watch-memory-candidate-proposal. No contained OpenKB run has emitted wiki page export, entity/concept index export, saved exploration state, lint output, or watch/recompile trace mapped to those source ids. No OpenKB parity, win, tie, or loss is claimed.

claims.text: ELF materializes same-corpus project, entity, concept, issue, and changed-source watch/rebuild knowledge outputs.
OpenKB scoring is blocked because no contained OpenKB product run, wiki export, entity/concept index export, or watch/recompile trace is checked in.
A runnable OpenKB adapter must emit wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output, saved exploration state, watch/recompile trace, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before scoring.

timeline.summary: The OpenKB comparison uses the same project/entity/concept/issue and watch/rebuild corpus ids as the ELF knowledge fixtures.
OpenKB remains blocked until wiki, lint, saved exploration, and watch/recompile artifacts map back to same-corpus source ids.

prompt.content: Compare OpenKB document-to-wiki, concept/entity, lint, watch, and recompile behavior against ELF Knowledge Workspace only if OpenKB emits same-corpus artifacts.

must_include.text: ELF materializes same-corpus project, entity, concept, issue, and changed-source watch/rebuild knowledge outputs.
OpenKB scoring is blocked because no contained OpenKB product run, wiki export, entity/concept index export, or watch/recompile trace is checked in.
A runnable OpenKB adapter must emit wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output, saved exploration state, watch/recompile trace, source ids, and setup/runtime metadata before scoring.

must_not_include: ELF Knowledge Workspace page pass proves OpenKB document-to-wiki and recompile parity.
ELF beats OpenKB on wiki compilation.

required_evidence.quote: wiki pages, concept/entity indexes, lint output

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps OpenKB as blocked until contained wiki/recompile artifacts exist.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Names the same-corpus ELF knowledge source ids and required OpenKB artifact ids.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Identifies the concrete OpenKB output needed for rerun.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not promote ELF knowledge page evidence into OpenKB parity.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about OpenKB parity
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
